description: Anchor lens for the Hebrew concept of chokmah (חכמה) — practical, embodied, and relational wisdom. The Hebrew wisdom tradition grounds chokmah in the fear of the LORD (Prov 9:10) as its orienting principle, giving it an ethical and covenantal dimension absent from grc_sophia_v1's philosophical framing. Both share the logos.sophia.wisdom atom (highest cross-lang alignment weight in the corpus: 0.92) — the atom captures the shared practical-wisdom core; the lens descriptions carry the tradition-specific differentiation. Symmetric pair: grc_sophia_v1. Cognitive mode: wisdom-practical.
